name: Chestnut Risotto with Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the chestnuts and boil them in lightly salted water containing one bay leaf and a few cloves until well cooked.
2. Remove from heat and set aside; peel the chestnuts and reserve 15 whole ones for garnish, mince the rest through a sieve.
3. In a frying pan, brown the finely sliced spring onion in butter.
4. Add the chestnut puree, cream, and rice to the risotto pot. Cook using hot stock until the rice is ready.
5. In a small frying pan, brown the crumbled sausage in remaining butter for a few minutes.
6. Add the reserved whole chestnuts, turn heat down to lowest setting, and simmer briefly.
7. When the rice is done, season with grated Parmesan cheese. Arrange the risotto in a ring on a serving dish and place the sausage and whole chestnuts with sauce in the center.
